session_log.notes: RF-05 pass initialized. B-001 calibration batch processed (365 messages, Jan-Oct 2022). Zero primary RF-05 flags — B-001 is the low-baseline reference confirming RF-05 signal is concentrated in later Phase A and Phase B. Arc state initialized at zero. CP2 calibration questions generated. Halted per protocol.

CP2 COMPLETE. 5 addenda confirmed (RF05-ADD-001 through RF05-ADD-005). Key calibration outcomes: (1) Abby-framework predation attacks NOT RF-05 primary — no CPS fear, RF-04+RF-15 primary confirmed (ADD-001). (2) Legal threats follow temporal arc: early = Sev-2 genuine fear; later = Sev-1 paper tiger, but pattern remains analytically significant for GAL (ADD-002). (3) Physical harm allegations: RF-05 Sev-1 peripheral only, RF-04+RF-15 primary (ADD-003). (4) Pre-2022 iPhone record is an unprocessed dataset gap — Eli characterizes that period as MORE dangerous; 2022-2026 is the reduced-threat phase; flag for attorney at synthesis (ADD-004). (5) Eli's sustained threat-monitoring posture across all interactions is itself an RF-05 impact finding (ADD-005). Pass may now proceed to B-002.

PASS COMPLETE. All 31 batches processed. ARC-RF05-001 (Legal and Compliance-Demand Threat Pattern) active with 26 signals (Sev-1:14, Sev-2:12). Key milestones: S-002 arc formation (Nov 2022 first contempt filing threat); S-010 structural advantage disclosed (Feb 2024 retainer-free access); S-013 extreme allegation (May 2024 rape/assault); S-014 'See you in court' first instance (Jun 2024); S-016 first sole-custody filing threat (Aug 2024); S-019 communication-suppression legal threat (May 2025); S-020 DARVO-denial mechanism (Jul 2025); S-021 confirmed attorney engagement (Aug 2025); S-022 peak threat — consultation complete + agreement ready (Sep 2025); S-025 gatekeeping-to-contempt inversion (Nov 2025). 4 CP3 items generated. Arc unresolved at dataset close — Sep 2025 'agreement ready to sign' execution status unknown. Arc state updated in analysis-output/arc-states/RF-05-arc-state-B001.json.
